title: Build RoadNote note-taking app
description: Create RoadNote product: markdown notes, collaboration, sync, offline-first. Notion alternative without bloat. /mo. BlackRoad design system.
result:
Built RoadNote - Professional note-taking and productivity platform (Product #76). Live at https://1bfc2903.blackroad-admin.pages.dev

Features:
- Rich markdown editor with live preview, tables, code blocks, checklists
- Infinite notebooks and folders with powerful search
- Real-time collaboration with live cursors and version history
- Cloud sync (5GB-1TB) across all devices
- Mobile apps (iOS/Android) with offline mode
- Export to PDF/Markdown/HTML/DOCX
- End-to-end encryption (AES-256)
- Custom themes and dark mode
- Keyboard shortcuts and vim mode

Pricing: FREE → $8/mo Pro → $12/user/mo Team

🤖 Built with Claude Code | Product #76 of 200+
